seoDescription: SEA Thai Bistro in Santa Rosa's Montgomery Village is voted Best Thai Restaurant in Sonoma County: chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai blends authentic Thai with modern California ingredients.
heroHeading: Voted Best Thai in Sonoma County
heroSubheading: Chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai blends authentic Thai cooking with modern California ingredients in Montgomery Village.
aboutBody: SEA Thai Bistro is the work of chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai, whose Thai heritage and modern sensibility come together in a menu that dynamically blends Asian and contemporary American ingredients. The result has been voted Best Thai Restaurant in Sonoma County by The Press Democrat.

Tucked into Santa Rosa's Montgomery Village, SEA pairs that outstanding food with craft cocktails and attentive service in a lively bistro setting, a longtime local favorite that diners return to again and again.

services.title: Modern Thai Kitchen
services.description: Authentic Thai dishes blended with modern California ingredients, made to order.

services.title: Craft Bar & Cocktails
services.description: A full bar with craft cocktails and an extensive drink list.

services.title: Lunch & Dinner
services.description: Served in Montgomery Village, with patio seating available.

services.title: Catering & Private Dining
services.description: Catering and private events for gatherings across Sonoma County.

notes: Web-verified and authored for the ADA accessibility batch 2 (owner/history, services, awards confirmed from the business site + Yelp/Tripadvisor/press). confirmed:true.
